B_eff: linear combination of c_K2,c_S with embedding-dependent contractions
Berger_dependence: q functions, volume v(a), and curvature potential depend on a; not evaluated
boundary_conditions: if closed Berger Sigma has no edge, integration boundary form vanishes formally; collar and top-form ensemble/matching conditions remain open
candidate_domain: H^4(Sigma) for nonzero bending symbol, H^2(Sigma) for purely second order
claim_boundary: v5.12 derives the strongest source-qualified boundary normal-stress and stability architecture. Physical localization, dimensions, coefficients, pressure, embedding, and domain remain insufficient to evaluate L_c or derive an absolute unit.
flux_dependence: f^2 at fixed local flux or Q^2/V^2 at fixed integrated flux
inner_product: integral_Sigma xi eta dmu_h times unresolved normalization
potential: curvature cubics, Ric(n,n), pressure derivatives, collar and scalar response
quantum_terms: OPEN; global v5.10 projection not local

recycling_terms.Berger_anisotropic_modes: only their volume-changing mean component couples directly
recycling_terms.definition: H_rec=-delta Delta p_rec/delta xi_perp in the current pressure convention
recycling_terms.fixed_Q: delta p_rec=(dp/dV) integral_Sigma xi dA, a rank-one global response
recycling_terms.fixed_local_f: direct delta p_rec=0; the constant pressure shifts the background equilibrium and affects the combined Hessian only through that on-shell background
recycling_terms.localized_core_adjacent_modes: not derivable without a local source/matching solution
recycling_terms.sign: ensemble, orientation, and boundary term dependent
recycling_terms.uniform_radial_mode: nonzero mean and therefore can couple

rho_star_dependence: through collar integral and endpoint; rho_star=1 only normalized

scaling_origins.L^-2: two derivatives/curvatures in the tension area-Jacobi Hessian
scaling_origins.L^-3: one K density plus its second normal variation
scaling_origins.L^-4: bending/shape densities with two curvatures and two further variation derivatives
scaling_origins.collar: not assignable until physical rho and B_collar localize
scaling_origins.quantum: global 1/L^2 diagnostic cannot be inserted locally
scaling_origins.recycling: fixed f and fixed Q give distinct volume laws; conversion to an eigenvalue requires V(L,a), the boundary ensemble, and mode normalization
scaling_origins.scalar_topographic: not assignable until local stress response closes

sigma_dependence: through localized U,p_ST and background sigma=1/2; map open
zero_modes: isometries/gauge projection and collective radial mode classification open
